events.title: Camp ticket Camp Utgard ALL DAYS Midgardsblot Metalfestival 2026
Tent ticket Camp Utgard Midgardsblot Metalfestival 2026
Midgardsblot - Wednesday Pass
events.description: Midgardsblot 2026 -- Where Metal Meets Myth August 12, 2026 -- at the historic Borre Park and Midgard Vikingsenter, Horten. Please note that access to Blot ceremony only for 4-day pass holder. Set among Viking burial mounds by the Oslofjord, Midgardsblot is more than a festival -- it's a journey into the heart of Norse heritage. A Festival Beyond Music Over four unforgettable days, Midgardsblot unites extreme metal, folk, and experimental sounds with ancient traditions and Viking culture. The result is an atmosphere like no other -- a celebration that bridges the past and present. Immerse Yourself in Viking History Opening blót ritual to honor the old gods and set the tone. Viking village & market with crafts, food, and living history. Live battle reenactments and demonstrations by Viking warriors. Guided tours of Borre's burial mounds and exhibitions at the Vikingsenter. Midgard Talks -- daily lectures and panels on archaeology, history, and Norse tradition. Beachside festival camp for the full Midgardsblot experience. Family-Friendly & Inclusive No age limit -- families are welcome. Children under 12 free with a paying adult. Ages 16+ may attend independently. Accessible grounds and facilities. HC Companion: Free with valid documentation No age limit Arrangørens nettside Artistens nettside For more information see www.midgardsblot.no og Facebook

events.title: Midgardsblot Weekend Pass 2026
events.description: Get your Weekend Pass for Midgardsblot 2026 and experience two powerful days of concerts, rituals, and celebrations at the historic Borre burial mounds. This pass gives you access to the festival on Friday 14 August and Saturday 15 Perfect for those who want the essence of Midgardsblot packed into an intense two-day experience. Family-Friendly & Inclusive No age limit -- families are welcome. Children under 12 free with a paying adult. Ages 16+ may attend independently. Accessible grounds and facilities. HC Companion: Free with valid documentation No age limit For more information see www.midgardsblot.no and Facebook

events.title: Festivalpass med NATTEN Slottsfjell 2027
events.description: Slottsfjell har flyttet ned fra fjellet til vakre Kaldnes, kun fire minutters gange fra legendariske Tønsberg Brygge. På området opplever du fremtidens festival midt i sentrum av Norges beste sommerby, Tønsberg. Omkranset av skjærgård byr vi på en bred og spennende musikkprofil på store utendørsscener, nattklubb og vår egen strand. Når du vil trekke deg tilbake har vi flere loungeområder og en gigantisk mathall hvor du kan nyte mat fra hele verden med vennene dine. Når solen går ned, og lyden fra hovedscenen har stilnet, presenterer vi Norges største nattklubb - NATTEN! Festivalpasset inkluderer NATTEN og har 20 års aldersgrense - gyldig ID kreves! Portene åpner kl. 13:00 hver dag. NATTEN åpner kl. 21:00 Ledsager gratis mot fremvisning av gyldig ledsagerbevis. For mer informasjon om artistslipp, program og praktiske opplysninger se Slottsfjells hjemmeside og facebookside

events.title: Festivalpass uten Natten Slottsfjell 2027
events.description: Slottsfjell is a rock- and pop festival located at Slottsfjellet in Tønsberg where stages and public areas is constructed amongst the ruins of the medieval fortress Tunsberghus on Slottsfjellet and the surrounding area. There are also concerts in other venues in the city. This festival pass is ONLY for those over 18 years - valid ID required! HC Companion is free if valid escort certificate can be presented at the entrance. The gates open at. 13:00 every day. For more information about artist announcments, program and practical information, see Slottsfjell's homepage og facebookpage. Also, check the mood of previous festivals on their YouTube channel.
